sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Nullable(Int8));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST(1 AS Nullable(Int8))) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST(value AS Int8)) AS default_value FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST('some_string' AS String)));
